content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-7-max

## Summary

Reviewed the additive MilestoneBundle generation changes: new helpers (infer_workstream_order, validate_dependency_graph, summarize_bundle), cycle detection wired into validate(), enhanced render_plan_md with Summary/Dependency Graph/Deferred Items sections, and enriched milestone_bundle prompt template. Build is clean, all 40 bundle unit tests pass, cargo fmt --check passes, and library-level clippy is warning-free. The new topological sort is deterministic (BTreeSet), safely handles the depth/zero-divisor cases, and cycle detection correctly integrates with the existing error aggregation in validate(). Noted only minor non-blocking observations (e.g., acceptance_coverage_percentage trivially resolves to 100% for validated bundles because validation already enforces non-empty covered_by; collect_deferred_items uses substring heuristics with possible false positives) — none of these are correctness, safety, or robustness bugs. No amendments required.

## Amendments

None.
